---
title: "Extensive-Form Games"
short-title: "Extensive Form"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "Game trees, backward induction, and subgame perfect equilibrium."
keywords: ["extensive form", "game tree", "backward induction", "subgame perfection"]
---

# Extensive-Form Games {#sec-extensive-form}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is under development.
:::
